aesthetic_description: A highly structured, high-density, authoritative enterprise dashboard built for scale. Focuses on clarity, trust, and operational efficiency over decoration. Avoids purple/teal 'AI-slop'. Employs a 'Control Room Grid' for density, utilizing stark whites, zinc grays for subtle structure, and a deep Corporate Blue (#2563EB) for action items. The aesthetic is clean, tabular, and print-inspired but optimized for digital screens.

tech_stack.interactivity: Vanilla JS / Alpine.js (via CDN if needed)

headings.description: Bold, authoritative sans-serif for dashboard titles, metrics, and report headers.

body.description: Clean, sterile, highly legible font for dense data tables and forms. Use tabular-nums for financial digits.

sidebar.html_structure: Dark vertical aside with logo, navigation links, and active state indicators.
sidebar.classes: fixed inset-y-0 left-0 w-64 bg-zinc-900 text-zinc-300 border-r border-zinc-800 flex flex-col
sidebar.link_classes: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:text-white transition-colors

topbar.html_structure: Sticky header for page context, search, and user profile.
topbar.classes: sticky top-0 z-40 flex h-16 shrink-0 items-center gap-x-4 border-b border-zinc-200 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md px-4 sm:gap-x-6 sm:px-6 lg:px-8

kpi_card.html_structure: Simple white card with label, prominent number, and trend indicator.
kpi_card.classes: bg-white border border-zinc-200 rounded-lg p-6 shadow-sm hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200

data_table.html_structure: Full-width table inside a card container with sticky headers and zebra striping.
data_table.wrapper_classes: overflow-x-auto ring-1 ring-zinc-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm bg-white
data_table.th_classes: px-6 py-3 bg-zinc-50 text-left text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-zinc-500
data_table.td_classes: px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm text-zinc-700 tabular-nums

button.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md bg-blue-600 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white shadow-sm hover:bg-blue-700 hover:text-white focus-visible:outline focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-offset-2 focus-visible:outline-blue-600 transition-colors
button.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-zinc-900 shadow-sm ring-1 ring-inset ring-zinc-300 hover:bg-zinc-50 transition-colors
button.danger: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md bg-red-600 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white shadow-sm hover:bg-red-700 transition-colors

form_input.label: block text-sm font-medium text-zinc-700
form_input.input: block w-full rounded-md border-0 py-1.5 text-zinc-900 shadow-sm ring-1 ring-inset ring-zinc-300 placeholder:text-zinc-400 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-inset focus:ring-blue-600 sm:text-sm sm:leading-6

badge.classes: inline-flex items-center rounded-md px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium ring-1 ring-inset

login_background.description: Innovative modern architecture campus building during twilight. Use as side-panel background on the login page.

hero_office.description: Modern university campus building with a clock, representing the academy's modern infrastructure.

avatars.description: Professional headshot of a female employee.
Professional headshot of a male business professional in blue suit.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case. Example: data-testid='submit-payment-btn'.
accessibility_and_testing.aria_labels: Use aria-labels for icon-only buttons or links.
accessibility_and_testing.focus_states: Ensure every link, input, and button has clear focus:ring classes with high contrast.

instructions_to_main_agent: Since this is Django, build layouts using Django Template inheritance (e.g., base.html, dashboard_base.html).
Use Tailwind CSS via CDN link in the base template: <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
Configure Tailwind directly in the CDN script tag using: tailwind.config = { theme: { extend: { fontFamily: { sans: ['Satoshi', 'Inter', 'sans-serif'], mono: ['ui-monospace'] } } } }
Do NOT use React. Render raw HTML tables, forms, and cards, utilizing Django templating tags for loops and conditionals.
Strictly apply data-testid attributes to every button, anchor tag, form input, and dashboard KPI.
Implement the 5-9 core metric rule in the dashboard: keep it clean, utilizing the 'kpi_card' structure and tabular figures for data tables.
For the login page, create a split-screen design using the 'login_background' image on one side and a clean, vertically centered form on the other side.
